texto: I know a person that's like none i've even met before,one that is kind,gentle and has the most beautiful heart i've ever seen.For him all the good things in the world would not suffice for he deserves so so much more...somehow the wings i saw yesterday in a picture look like the wings i can see on his angel soul ^^
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Miya13: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. O trecho “I know a person that's like none i've even met before,one that is kind,gentle and has the most be…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que amor, angel, feelings pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de feelings e love.
